mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Excessively high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 225) triggers central bank tightening expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as risk assets reprice monetary policy risks.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 225 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in unemployment (UNRATE) and increases in payrolls (PAYEMS) signal a tightening labor market, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of UNRATE and PAYEMS fails to predict SPX returns with a 3-year rolling Rank IC > 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in housing starts (HOUST < 700) indicates weakening consumer demand, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as economic growth expectations decline.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST falls below 700 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in industrial production (INDPRO > 96) reflects robust manufacturing activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through improved corporate margins.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 96 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in consumer spending (RSAFS > 400,000) indicates strong demand-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through elevated corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS exceeds 400,000.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL signal a tightening monetary cycle amid inflation, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as valuation multiples contract.
failure_condition: The joint movement of FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL fails to predict SPX returns with a 3-year rolling Rank IC > 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden spike in unemployment (UNRATE > 8.5) indicates labor market deterioration, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as recession risks escalate.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8.5 despite the signal.
